testcase.name: TC10 - House for Sale listings shown and Map View renders property location correctly

failure.message: Cannot invoke "org.openqa.selenium.WebDriver.getWindowHandle()" because the return value of "utils.DriverManager.getDriver()" is null

testcase.failure: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "org.openqa.selenium.WebDriver.getWindowHandle()" because the return value of "utils.DriverManager.getDriver()" is null at stepDefinitions.MagicBricksStepDefinitions.the_user_is_on_the_MagicBricks_Mumbai_residential_page(MagicBricksStepDefinitions.java:45) at ✽.the user is on the MagicBricks Mumbai residential page(file:///F:/BDD_Sprint/SayanMagicbricks/src/test/resources/features/MagicBricks.feature:7)
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the MagicBricks Mumbai residential page................failed When the user clicks the Buy heading........................................skipped And the user clicks "House for sale in Mumbai"..............................skipped And the user switches to the new tab........................................skipped And the user clicks on the specific house property..........................skipped And the user switches to the house detail tab...............................skipped And the user scrolls down by 1500 pixels....................................skipped And the user clicks About Locality tab......................................skipped And the user scrolls up by 100 pixels.......................................skipped And the user clicks Explore Locality........................................skipped And the user switches to the locality tab...................................skipped And the user clicks the map view button.....................................skipped Then the map should be displayed with the property marked...................skipped
